claim: For an 8192x1024 fp32 row-major copy on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, mapping adjacent lanes across columns measured 7.309428x faster than the strided baseline using HIP-event timing only.
expected_profiler_signals: fewer memory transactions per useful byte
better coalescing on rectangular row-major shape
curation_note: timing-only rectangular sweep: HIP-event timings and correctness passed, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters were not collected because rocprof, rocprofv3, rocminfo, and rocm-smi were unavailable in this Windows venv environment. The optimized run includes one implausibly tiny min sample, so use median and p10/p90 rather than best-of timing.
